results.title: Toward Culturally Aligned LLMs through Ontology-Guided Multi-Agent Reasoning
results.reason: 76 fine-grained value categories for LLM agent ontology directly anticipates fine-grained-taxonomy-for-LLM-agent novelty claim.

results.title: LLM-based Ontology Learning
results.reason: Taxonomy induction via LLM is the operative mechanism.

results.title: Agent-OM: LLM Agents for Ontology Matching
results.reason: Matching existing ontologies is distinct from constructing fine-grained operational-state taxonomy; skeptical miss.

results.title: LLM-Driven Ontology Construction for Enterprise KGs
results.reason: LLM-driven domain ontology construction overlaps core proposal.

results.title: Ontology-Constrained Neural Reasoning in Enterprise Agentic Systems
results.reason: Ontology-constrained agent reasoning pipeline = same architectural pattern.

results.title: LLM Agents in Law: Taxonomy
results.reason: Taxonomy is of applications, not operational-state labels.

results.title: Indigenous Ice Dictionaries
results.reason: Source-domain reference, not LLM prior art.

results.title: Arctic Sea Ice Remote Sensing with AI
Combining Indigenous knowledge and AI for on-ice travel
results.reason: ML on Inuit-validated data is not LLM-agent operational-state taxonomy; skeptical miss.

results.title: AI methods for sea ice concentration

disagreements_with_07.note: Ontology matching != fine-grained taxonomy construction; skeptical reading rejects this as substantive prior art.
News piece on ML+Inuit knowledge for ice-travel decision support; not LLM-agent operational-state taxonomy mechanism; analogy too loose.

agreement_summary: Agree on 11/13; disagree on 2 where 07 was less skeptical.
